verses.latin_vulgate: Fugit impius nemine persequente ;  justus autem, quasi leo confidens, absque terrore erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָ֣סוּ וְאֵין־רֹדֵ֣ף רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝צַדִּיקִ֗ים כִּכְפִ֥יר יִבְטָֽח׃
verses.douay_rheims: The wicked man fleeth, when no man pursueth: but the just, bold as a lion, shall be without dread.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalatoin pakenee, ja ei kenkään aja häntä takaa; vaan jumalinen on rohkia niinkuin nuori jalopeura.
verses.king_james: The wicked flee when no man pursueth: but the righteous are bold as a lion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter peccata terræ multi principes ejus ;  et propter hominis sapientiam, et horum scientiam quæ dicuntur,  vita ducis longior erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּפֶ֣שַֽׁע אֶ֭רֶץ רַבִּ֣ים שָׂרֶ֑יהָ וּבְאָדָ֥ם מֵבִ֥ין יֹ֝דֵ֗עַ כֵּ֣ן יַאֲרִֽיךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the sins of the land many are the princes thereof: and for the wisdom of a man, and the knowledge of those things that are said, the life of the prince shall be prolonged.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maakunnan synnin tähden tulee valtakuntaan monta päämiestä; vaan toimellisten ja ymmärtäväisten ihmisten tähden pysyy se kauvan.
verses.king_james: For the transgression of a land many are the princes thereof: but by a man of understanding and knowledge the state thereof shall be prolonged.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vir pauper calumnians pauperes  similis est imbri vehementi in quo paratur fames.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֶּֽבֶר־רָ֭שׁ וְעֹשֵׁ֣ק דַּלִּ֑ים מָטָ֥ר סֹ֝חֵ֗ף וְאֵ֣ין לָֽחֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: A poor man that oppresseth the poor, is like a violent shower, which bringeth a famine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nälkäinen, joka köyhiä vaivaa, on niinkuin sadekuuro, joka hedelmän turmelee.
verses.king_james: A poor man that oppresseth the poor is like a sweeping rain which leaveth no food.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui derelinquunt legem laudant impium ;  qui custodiunt, succenduntur contra eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹזְבֵ֣י ת֭וֹרָה יְהַלְל֣וּ רָשָׁ֑ע וְשֹׁמְרֵ֥י ת֝וֹרָ֗ה יִתְגָּ֥רוּ בָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: They that forsake the law, praise the wicked man: they that keep it, are incensed against him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka lain hylkäävät, ne ylistävät jumalattomia; vaan jotka lain kätkevät, ovat heille vihaiset.
verses.king_james: They that forsake the law praise the wicked: but such as keep the law contend with them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri mali non cogitant judicium ;  qui autem inquirunt Dominum animadvertunt omnia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁי־רָ֭ע לֹא־יָבִ֣ינוּ מִשְׁפָּ֑ט וּמְבַקְשֵׁ֥י יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה יָבִ֥ינוּ כֹֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Evil men think not on judgment: but they that seek after the Lord, take notice of all things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei pahat ihmiset oikeudesta lukua pidä; vaan jotka Herraa etsivät, he ottavat kaikista vaarin.
verses.king_james: Evil men understand not judgment: but they that seek the Lord understand all things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Melior est pauper ambulans in simplicitate sua  quam dives in pravis itineribus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֽוֹב־רָ֭שׁ הוֹלֵ֣ךְ בְּתֻמּ֑וֹ מֵעִקֵּ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכַ֗יִם וְה֣וּא עָשִֽׁיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Better is the poor man walking in his simplicity, than the rich in crooked ways.
verses.finnish_biblia: Parempi on köyhä joka vakuudessansa vaeltaa, kuin rikas, joka väärillä teillä käyskentelee.
verses.king_james: Better is the poor that walketh in his uprightness, than he that is perverse in his ways, though he be rich.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui custodit legem filius sapiens est ;  qui autem comessatores pascit confundit patrem suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹצֵ֣ר תּ֭וֹרָה בֵּ֣ן מֵבִ֑ין וְרֹעֶ֥ה ז֝וֹלְלִ֗ים יַכְלִ֥ים אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that keepeth the law, is a wise son: but he that feedeth gluttons, shameth his father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka lain kätkee, se on toimellinen lapsi; mutta joka tuhlaajaa ruokkii, se häpäisee isänsä.
verses.king_james: Whoso keepeth the law is a wise son: but he that is a companion of riotous men shameth his father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui coacervat divitias usuris et fœnore,  liberali in pauperes congregat eas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַרְבֶּ֣ה ה֭וֹנוֹ בְּנֶ֣שֶׁךְ (ובתרבית) [וְתַרְבִּ֑ית] לְחוֹנֵ֖ן דַּלִּ֣ים יִקְבְּצֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that heapeth together riches by usury and loan, gathereth them for him that will be bountiful to the poor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka tavaransa enentää korolla ja voitolla, se kokoo köyhäin tarpeeksi.
verses.king_james: He that by usury and unjust gain increaseth his substance, he shall gather it for him that will pity the poor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui declinat aures suas ne audiat legem,  oratio ejus erit execrabilis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵסִ֣יר אׇ֭זְנוֹ מִשְּׁמֹ֣עַ תּוֹרָ֑ה גַּ֥ם תְּ֝פִלָּת֗וֹ תּוֹעֵבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that turneth away his ears from hearing the law, his prayer shall be an abomination.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka korvansa kääntää pois lain kuulosta, hänen rukouksensakin on kauhistus.
verses.king_james: He that turneth away his ear from hearing the law, even his prayer shall be abomination.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui decipit justos in via mala, in interitu suo corruet,  et simplices possidebunt bona ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשְׁגֶּ֤ה יְשָׁרִ֨ים ׀ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ רָ֗ע בִּשְׁחוּת֥וֹ הֽוּא־יִפּ֑וֹל וּ֝תְמִימִ֗ים יִנְחֲלוּ־טֽוֹב׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He that deceiveth the just in a wicked way, shall fall in his own destruction: and the upright shall possess his goods.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka jumaliset saattaa väärälle tielle, hän lankee omaan kuoppaansa; mutta hurskaat perivät hyvyyden.
verses.king_james: Whoso causeth the righteous to go astray in an evil way, he shall fall himself into his own pit: but the upright shall have good things in possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sapiens sibi videtur vir dives ;  pauper autem prudens scrutabitur eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָכָ֣ם בְּ֭עֵינָיו אִ֣ישׁ עָשִׁ֑יר וְדַ֖ל מֵבִ֣ין יַחְקְרֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The rich man seemeth to himself wise: but the poor man that is prudent shall search him out.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rikas luulee itsensä viisaaksi, vaan toimellinen köyhä ymmärtää hänen.
verses.king_james: The rich man is wise in his own conceit; but the poor that hath understanding searcheth him out.

verses.latin_vulgate: In exsultatione justorum multa gloria est ;  regnantibus impiis, ruinæ hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּעֲלֹ֣ץ צַ֭דִּיקִים רַבָּ֣ה תִפְאָ֑רֶת וּבְק֥וּם רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְחֻפַּ֥שׂ אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the joy of the just there is great glory: when the wicked reign, men are ruined.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin vanhurskaat vallitsevat, niin käy sangen hyvin; vaan koska jumalattomat hallitsevat, niin muuttet ovat kansan seassa.
verses.king_james: When righteous men do rejoice, there is great glory: but when the wicked rise, a man is hidden.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui abscondit scelera sua non dirigetur ;  qui autem confessus fuerit et reliquerit ea, misericordiam consequetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְכַסֶּ֣ה פְ֭שָׁעָיו לֹ֣א יַצְלִ֑יחַ וּמוֹדֶ֖ה וְעֹזֵ֣ב יְרֻחָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that hideth his sins, shall not prosper: but he that shall confess, and forsake them, shall obtain mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka pahan tekonsa kieltää, ei hän menesty; vaan joka sen tunnustaa ja hylkää, hänelle tapahtuu laupius.
verses.king_james: He that covereth his sins shall not prosper: but whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall have mercy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus homo qui semper est pavidus ;  qui vero mentis est duræ corruet in malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֣י אָ֭דָם מְפַחֵ֣ד תָּמִ֑יד וּמַקְשֶׁ֥ה לִ֝בּ֗וֹ יִפּ֥וֹל בְּרָעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is the man that is always fearful: but he that is hardened in mind shall fall into evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se ihminen, joka aina pelkää; vaan joka sydämensä paaduttaa, se lankee onnettomuuteen.
verses.king_james: Happy is the man that feareth alway: but he that hardeneth his heart shall fall into mischief.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leo rugiens et ursus esuriens,  princeps impius super populum pauperem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲֽרִי־נֹ֭הֵם וְדֹ֣ב שׁוֹקֵ֑ק מוֹשֵׁ֥ל רָ֝שָׁ֗ע עַ֣ל עַם־דָּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: As a roaring lion, and a hungry bear, so is a wicked prince over the poor people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalatoin päämies, joka köyhää kansaa hallitsee, on kiljuva jalopeura ja ahne karhu.
verses.king_james: As a roaring lion, and a ranging bear; so is a wicked ruler over the poor people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dux indigens prudentia multos opprimet per calumniam ;  qui autem odit avaritiam, longi fient dies ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָגִ֗יד חֲסַ֣ר תְּ֭בוּנוֹת וְרַ֥ב מַעֲשַׁקּ֑וֹת (שנאי) [שֹׂ֥נֵא] בֶ֝֗צַע יַאֲרִ֥יךְ יָמִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: A prince void of prudence shall oppress many by calumny: but he that hateth covetousness, shall prolong his days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin hallitsia on ilman toimeta, niin paljon vääryyttä tapahtuu; vaan joka vihaa ahneutta, hän saa kauvan elää.
verses.king_james: The prince that wanteth understanding is also a great oppressor: but he that hateth covetousness shall prolong his days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hominem qui calumniatur animæ sanguinem,  si usque ad lacum fugerit, nemo sustinet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֭דָם עָשֻׁ֣ק בְּדַם־נָ֑פֶשׁ עַד־בּ֥וֹר יָ֝נ֗וּס אַל־יִתְמְכוּ־בֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: A man that doth violence to the blood of a person, if he flee even to the pit, no man will stay him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ihminen, joka jonkun sielun veressä vääryyttä tekee, ei pääse, vaikka hän hamaan hautaan pakenis.
verses.king_james: A man that doeth violence to the blood of any person shall flee to the pit; let no man stay him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ambulat simpliciter salvus erit ;  qui perversis graditur viis concidet semel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹלֵ֣ךְ תָּ֭מִים יִוָּשֵׁ֑עַ וְנֶעְקַ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכַ֗יִם יִפּ֥וֹל בְּאֶחָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that walketh uprightly, shall be saved: he that is perverse in his ways, shall fall at once.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka vakuudessa vaeltaa, se on tallessa; mutta joka käy pahaa tietä, hänen täytyy joskus langeta.
verses.king_james: Whoso walketh uprightly shall be saved: but he that is perverse in his ways shall fall at once.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui operatur terram suam satiabitur panibus ;  qui autem sectatur otium replebitur egestate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹבֵ֣ד אַ֭דְמָתוֹ יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־לָ֑חֶם וּמְרַדֵּ֥ף רֵ֝יקִ֗ים יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־רִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that tilleth his ground, shall be filled with bread: but he that followeth idleness, shall be filled with poverty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka peltonsa viljelee, hän saa leipää yltäisesti; vaan joka pyytää joutilaana käydä, se ravitaan köyhyydellä.
verses.king_james: He that tilleth his land shall have plenty of bread: but he that followeth after vain persons shall have poverty enough.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vir fidelis multum laudabitur ;  qui autem festinat ditari non erit innocens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֣ישׁ אֱ֭מוּנוֹת רַב־בְּרָכ֑וֹת וְאָ֥ץ לְ֝הַעֲשִׁ֗יר לֹ֣א יִנָּקֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: A faithful man shall be much praised: but he that maketh haste to be rich, shall not be innocent.
verses.finnish_biblia: Uskollinen mies runsaasti siunataan; vaan joka pyrkii rikkauden perään, ei hän ole viaton.
verses.king_james: A faithful man shall abound with blessings: but he that maketh haste to be rich shall not be innocent.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui cognoscit in judicio faciem non bene facit ;  iste et pro buccella panis deserit veritatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽכֵּר־פָּנִ֥ים לֹא־ט֑וֹב וְעַל־פַּת־לֶ֝֗חֶם יִפְשַׁע־גָּֽבֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that hath respect to a person in judgment, doth not well: such a man even for a morsel of bread forsaketh the truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei ole se hyvä, että joku katsoo muotoa; sillä ihminen taitaa tehdä leivän kappaleen tähden väärin.
verses.king_james: To have respect of persons is not good: for for a piece of bread that man will transgress.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vir qui festinat ditari, et aliis invidet,  ignorat quod egestas superveniet ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִ֥בְהָֽל־לַה֗וֹן אִ֭ישׁ רַ֣ע עָ֑יִן וְלֹא־יֵ֝דַ֗ע כִּי־חֶ֥סֶר יְבֹאֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: A man that maketh haste to be rich, and envieth others, is ignorant that poverty shall come upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka äkisti rikkautta pyytää, ja on kade, hänelle tulee köyhyys, ettei hän tiedäkään.
verses.king_james: He that hasteth to be rich hath an evil eye, and considereth not that poverty shall come upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui corripit hominem gratiam postea inveniet apud eum,  magis quam ille qui per linguæ blandimenta decipit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מ֘וֹכִ֤יחַ אָדָ֣ם אַ֭חֲרַי חֵ֣ן יִמְצָ֑א מִֽמַּחֲלִ֥יק לָשֽׁוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that rebuketh a man, shall afterward find favour with him, more than he that by a flattering tongue deceiveth him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka ihmistä rankaisee, hän löytää paremman ystävyyden kuin se, joka puhuu ymötämielin.
verses.king_james: He that rebuketh a man afterwards shall find more favour than he that flattereth with the tongue.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui subtrahit aliquid a patre suo et a matre,  et dicit hoc non esse peccatum,  particeps homicidæ est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גּוֹזֵ֤ל ׀ אָ֘בִ֤יו וְאִמּ֗וֹ וְאֹמֵ֥ר אֵֽין־פָּ֑שַׁע חָבֵ֥ר ה֝֗וּא לְאִ֣ישׁ מַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that stealeth any thing from his father, or from his mother: and saith, This is no sin, is the partner of a murderer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka ottaa isältänsä ja äidiltänsä, ja sanoo; ei se ole synti, hän on hävittäjän kanssaveli.
verses.king_james: Whoso robbeth his father or his mother, and saith, It is no transgression; the same is the companion of a destroyer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui se jactat et dilatat, jurgia concitat ;  qui vero sperat in Domino sanabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְחַב־נֶ֭פֶשׁ יְגָרֶ֣ה מָד֑וֹן וּבֹטֵ֖חַ עַל־יְהֹוָ֣ה יְדֻשָּֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that boasteth and puffeth up himself, stirreth up quarrels: but he that trusteth in the Lord, shall be healed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ylpiä ihminen saattaa riidan; mutta joka luottaa Herraan, hän kostuu.
verses.king_james: He that is of a proud heart stirreth up strife: but he that putteth his trust in the Lord shall be made fat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui confidit in corde suo stultus est ;  qui autem graditur sapienter, ipse salvabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בּוֹטֵ֣חַ בְּ֭לִבּוֹ ה֣וּא כְסִ֑יל וְהוֹלֵ֥ךְ בְּ֝חׇכְמָ֗ה ה֣וּא יִמָּלֵֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that trusteth in his own heart, is a fool: but he that walketh wisely, he shall be saved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka omaan sydämeensä uskaltaa, hän on tyhmä; mutta joka viisaudessa vaeltaa, hän vapahdetaan.
verses.king_james: He that trusteth in his own heart is a fool: but whoso walketh wisely, he shall be delivered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dat pauperi non indigebit ;  qui despicit deprecantem sustinebit penuriam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹתֵ֣ן לָ֭רָשׁ אֵ֣ין מַחְס֑וֹר וּמַעְלִ֥ים עֵ֝ינָ֗יו רַב־מְאֵרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that giveth to the poor shall not want: he that despiseth his entreaty, shall suffer indigence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka vaivaiselle antaa, ei häneltä puutu; vaan joka silmänsä hänestä kääntää, se tulee pahasti kirotuksi.
verses.king_james: He that giveth unto the poor shall not lack: but he that hideth his eyes shall have many a curse.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum surrexerint impii, abscondentur homines ;  cum illi perierint, multiplicabuntur justi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּק֣וּם רְ֭שָׁעִים יִסָּתֵ֣ר אָדָ֑ם וּ֝בְאׇבְדָ֗ם יִרְבּ֥וּ צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: When the wicked rise up, men shall hide themselves: when they perish, the just shall be multiplied.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin jumalattomat tulevat, niin kansa itsensä kätkee; mutta kuin ne hukkuvat, niin vanhurskaat enenevät.
verses.king_james: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves: but when they perish, the righteous increase.
